'''Galltine''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]]-inhabited planet in the [[Galltine system/Legends|Galltine system]] of the [[Thesme sector/Legends|Thesme sector]].

[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[operative]] and [[Bespin Motors/Legends|Bespin Motors]] [[Exex]] [[Elea Poista]] created a false identity—"Kel"—to sell contraband on the [[Black market/Legends|black market]]. The identity was highly detailed and indicated that Kel had been born on Galltine.<ref name="GG2-2">[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin'', Second Edition]]</ref>
